content.en:
The Heavenly Wind Supreme shattered one of the boxes, revealing an incomparably huge cyan crystal, which was the Eternal Source Soul Blue.

"You protect the Dharma for me, and I will refine the soul bluegold!"

Heavenly Wind Supreme said.

"Good!"

Several of the other first-class invincibles nodded.

Once the Heavenly Wind Supreme breaks through to the Supreme One, it will only be good for them, and there will be no harm.

Perhaps, in the future, with the help of the Heavenly Wind Supreme, they will also have the hope of being promoted to the Supreme One.

For example, the top few Eternal Name-level forces in the Tianlin Realm gave birth to the first Supreme One at the beginning, and later with the help of that Supreme One, one after another Supreme One was born, causing their own power to become stronger and stronger.

The Heavenly Wind Supreme began to absorb the material inside the soul lapis gold, and the ordinary invincible could not absorb the internal material of the Eternal Source at all, but the first-class invincible who created the Supreme Technique and condensed the Eternal Tribulation Body was able to use the Supreme Technique as a guide and the Eternal Tribulation Body as a medium to connect the internal substance of the Eternal Source Matter, absorb and refine this substance, so as to break the shackles and be promoted to the Supreme One.

Of course, this will not completely destroy the Eternal Source, once the internal matter of the Eternal Source is consumed, it can be slowly restored after a long time.

If one Supreme One had been created and an Eternal Source had been destroyed, there would not have been so many Eternal Sources in the Source Sea, and they would have been exhausted long ago.

As time passed, the Heavenly Wind Supreme absorbed more and more spiritual lapis substance.

The Netherworld Temple did not send a large number of first-class invincibles to interrupt the breakthrough of the Heavenly Wind Supreme, because it was useless to interrupt, and the breakthrough could continue.

Besides, the Netherworld Temple was not willing to suffer heavy losses.

In addition, if once the Heavenly Wind Supreme breaks through to the Supreme Realm, the first-class invincible people of the Netherworld Hall have not yet withdrawn, I am afraid that they will all be killed.

At this time.

The first-class invincibles of the Netherworld Hall are all waiting for the Netherworld Hall Master to give an order, whether to leave, or continue to stay here.

......

Tianlin Realm, Netherworld Temple.

Several first-class invincibles are reporting to the Nether Hall Master.

"Hall Master, according to the news, Tianfeng Hai has already sent the soul bluegold to the Tianfeng Supreme, with the Tianfeng Supreme's natural qualifications and potential, his hope of being able to break through is more than ninety percent!" said an invincible man.

"A bunch of rubbish!"

The Nether Temple Lord said angrily.

He has been staring at the upper echelons of the Tianfeng Sea in the Tianlin Realm, and any invincible person above the third rank will not want to go to the Yuanji Abyss through the Source Sea, if one comes out, he will kill one.

Therefore, he could only leave the task of intercepting the soul bluegold to those invincible people in the Netherworld Temple.

Unexpectedly, they still messed up.

Once the Heavenly Wind Supreme really breaks through, even if the strength is inferior, everyone is supreme, and the difference in strength is not very large, and he can't kill the other party at all.

This time it was really a big loss, setting up a big enemy for himself, and it also made the Netherworld Temple and the Heavenly Wind Sea completely hostile.

"The hall master is angry!"

Several first-class invincibles said in fear.

"Get out!"

The Nether Hall Lord rebuked angrily.

Several first-class invincible people hurriedly retreated, for fear that if they took a step too late, they would be reprimanded or punished by the Netherworld Hall Lord.

-----------------------

Before you know it, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

this day.

The Yuanji Abyss shook, and a powerful aura seemed to run through the entire Yuanji Abyss.

"Someone is attacking the Supreme Realm!"

Many of the invincibles were shocked.

Soon, they guessed that it was the Heavenly Wind Supreme who was breaking through, otherwise it would not have been such a coincidence.

The process of breaking through was very fast, and in a short time, the Heavenly Wind Supreme had already stepped into the bottleneck, and it was considered to have entered the realm of the Supreme One, although the realm was not yet stable, but it was already a real Supreme One.

It was also at the moment when he broke through to the Supreme One that he was ostracized by the Yuan Extreme Abyss.

If he dared to resist this rejection, he would definitely be completely suppressed by the Yuanji Abyss.

"It's not good, run away!"

Many invincible people in the Yuanji Abyss came to their senses one after another, and immediately began to flee outside the Yuanji Abyss.

Because just now, the Heavenly Wind Supreme broke through to the Supreme One, and the breath of the Supreme One was transmitted from the depths of the Yuan Extreme Abyss, causing many Abyss Tribulation Beasts in the depths of the Yuan Extreme Abyss to be frightened and rushed out from the depths of the Yuan Extreme Abyss.

As a result, the invincible people in the outer layer of the Yuanji Abyss suffered, and once they encountered those incomparably terrifying abyssal beasts, they were afraid that they would be eaten as snacks.

All of a sudden, many invincible people died tragically at the hands of the Abyssal Beasts.

I have to say, these people are so unlucky!

The invincible person with the ability of the clone is not bad, but the loss of a clone, but the invincible without the clone is really dead.

But the invincibility of the doppelganger is so rare that it can almost be ignored.

Since the invincible are on the run, who is going to alert the others?

In addition, it was not too convenient for the Yuanji Abyss to transmit information, and the speed of the Abyss Tribulation Beast was too fast, resulting in the invincible people in the outermost layer of the Yuanji Abyss not knowing the news for the first time.

Ye Tian was not far from a void passage, and there were quite a few invincibles nearby.

Abrupt.

An incomparably huge abyssal beast tore through the void and descended on this layer, and the terrifying aura made many invincibles terrified.

"It's not good, this is an abyssal tribulation beast comparable to more than 100,000 tribulations!"

There was an invincible man who was frightened.

These abyssal beasts are comparable to first-class invincibles, where can they match?

"Run!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate, he wanted to run away as soon as possible.

At the same time, he instinctively cast his talent for copying, enveloping the abyssal beast.

Suddenly, he saw an incredible talent.

【Eternal Ancestor: Tribulation】

【Eternal Ancestral Endowment: Space】

This is an abyssal tribulation beast with two Eternal Ancestral Endowments, one of which turned out to be the Spatial Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

Although Ye Tian has a lot of Eternal Ancestral Endowments, he currently lacks only two Eternal Ancestral Endowments, one is the Spatial Eternal Ancestral Endowment, and the other is the Eternal Ancestral Endowment of Time.

His Eternal Ancestral Endowment was all copied and fused, but there were too few invincible people with the ultimate Ancestral Endowment of space and time, so they had not been fused into the Eternal Ancestral Endowment so far.

However, this time, it can directly replicate the Eternal Ancestral Endowment of Space.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word and began to look for a copy.

Of course, it would take a little time to copy the Eternal Ancestor, but once he copied it, even if he was far away from here, it would not interrupt the copying process in the slightest, which was the result of his experiments.

So, he wanted to escape from here and avoid being killed by the abyssal beast.

However, this Abyssal Tribulation was so powerful that many of the invincibles were destroyed almost instantly.

In terms of speed, Ye Tian was far inferior to the other party, if there were no special means, he was afraid that he would not be able to escape.

Moment of truth.

Ye Tian used all his strength to stimulate the talent of the Eternal Ancestor Tribulation, which was a talent from the Tribulation Beast.

When this talent was stimulated, coupled with Ye Tian's deliberate simulation of the aura of the robbery beast, for a while, this abyss robbery beast actually mistook Ye Tian for a robbery beast, so the claws that originally attacked Ye Tian stretched out.

It is an instinct that robbers do not kill robbers.

But when Ye Tian escaped into the Void Passage and left the Yuanji Abyss, this Abyss Tribulation Beast suddenly realized that he had been deceived, and he was immediately extremely annoyed, and wanted to rush over to kill Ye Tian.

However, it was already too late.
